segments.text: The percent caught up before I knew it!
segments.original_text: 気づけばパーセント追いついている

segments.text: Just caught in a few hits and launched, but...
segments.original_text: なんか数回攻撃に当たって打ち上げられただけなのに

segments.text: The damage piled up out of nowhere!
segments.original_text: いつの間にかダメージが追いついている

segments.text: Now with that Pikmin pull hitstop...
segments.original_text: さあピクミンを引いたヒットストップで

segments.text: It turned into a juggle situation and here comes the fair!
segments.original_text: 浮かせ展開に化けてしまったが空前

full_text: The percent caught up before I knew it! Just caught in a few hits and launched, but... The damage piled up out of nowhere! Now with that Pikmin pull hitstop... It turned into a juggle situation and here comes the fair! Here...
